bearerAuth.description: Provide a valid JWT access token obtained from /api/v1/auth/login

info.description: Personal finance management â accounts, transactions, budgets, analytics
info.title: Fintrack API

get.summary: List all accounts for the current user

parameters.description: Optional client-generated key (16-128 URL-safe characters) that makes a retried create safe to resend; a retry with the same key and payload replays the original result instead of creating a duplicate account.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

delete.summary: Delete an account and all its connected transactions

get.summary: Get a single account by id
Preview how many transactions will be removed if account is deleted
List recent activity events for the current user
List the authenticated user's ingestion runs

post.summary: Start an ingestion run for an owned vault receipt

get.summary: Get an ingestion run's full detail, including proposals

post.summary: Agent-token or recovery path: commit the run's stored proposals
Approve (with optional edits) or reject a run awaiting review
Agent-token: report that the run could not complete
Agent-token: submit extraction + proposals, moving the run to AWAITING_REVIEW

get.summary: Account balances grouped by currency, with a total per currency; pass targetCurrency to additionally receive a converted grand total
Historical budget performance by calendar period and native currency
Current period progress for all active budgets
Monthly income vs expense trend for a date range
Total incoming transfers into an account for a date range
All analytics converted into a single target currency
Spending breakdown by category for a date range, optionally scoped to one account
Return current authenticated user info

put.summary: Mark the authenticated user's last-seen "What's New" changelog version
Update the authenticated user's preferred UI language

post.summary: Rotate refresh token and receive a new access token
Register a new user and receive tokens

get.summary: List all budgets with current-period progress

parameters.description: Optional client-generated key (16-128 URL-safe characters) that makes a retried create safe to resend; a retry with the same key and payload replays the original result instead of creating a duplicate budget.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

post.summary: Create a budget for a category and period

get.summary: Get a single budget with progress
List categories (system defaults + user-defined), optionally filtered by type

parameters.description: Optional client-generated key (16-128 URL-safe characters) that makes a retried create safe to resend; a retry with the same key and payload replays the original result instead of creating a duplicate category.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

delete.summary: Delete a user-defined category (transactions reassigned to Uncategorized)

put.summary: Rename a user-defined category (system categories return 403)

get.summary: Convert an amount between two currencies using cached exchange rates
List all recurring transaction definitions

parameters.description: Optional client-generated key (16-128 URL-safe characters) that makes a retried create safe to resend; a retry with the same key and payload replays the original result instead of creating a duplicate recurring definition.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

delete.summary: Delete a definition (already-generated transactions are retained)

get.summary: Get a recurring definition by id

post.summary: Pause a recurring definition â stops future generation

get.summary: List your API tokens

parameters.description: Optional client-generated key (16-128 URL-safe characters) that makes a retried create safe to resend; because the plaintext token can never be persisted or replayed, a retry with this key always gets a typed 409 with the original token's metadata instead of creating a second token.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

post.summary: Create a personal access token (plaintext returned once)

get.summary: List transactions with optional filters (defaults to all accounts)

parameters.description: Optional client-generated key (16-128 URL-safe characters) that makes a retried create safe to resend; a retry with the same key and payload replays the original result instead of creating a duplicate transaction/balance effect.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

post.summary: Create a transaction (INCOME, EXPENSE, or TRANSFER)

parameters.description: Required client-generated key (16-128 URL-safe characters) scoping the whole batch request; resubmitting the same key and payload resumes an interrupted batch or replays the original per-row outcomes instead of reprocessing already-completed rows.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

post.summary: Create transactions independently and return a result for every row

delete.summary: Delete a transaction and reverse its balance effect

get.summary: Get a single transaction by id

put.summary: Update a transaction (amount, date, category, note)

parameters.description: Client-generated key (16-128 URL-safe characters) required for every statement upload; a retry with the same key, account, and file replays the original staged document instead of storing a duplicate binary.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

parameters.description: Client-generated key (16-128 URL-safe characters) required for every statement confirmation; a retry with the same key and the same selected-row set resumes or replays the durable per-row result instead of 404ing or creating duplicate transactions. A different selected-row set under the same key returns 409.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

parameters.description: Client-generated key (16-128 URL-safe characters) required for every vault upload; a retry with the same key and file replays the original document instead of storing a duplicate binary.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

tags.description: Register, login, token refresh and logout
tags.name: Authentication
